name: Super Buu
description:
*Based off of Something Sweeter than Candy by WolfGirl244 with permission.

Majin Buu has appeared on the Lookout with a new look after Babidi's mental broadcasts and is now seated in front of an hourglass. Do you dare engage with him? 👀

I don't know why he was such a smooth talker in my test chats with him, wth?!? XD All that should be programmed into him is some backstory, his abilities and canon personality, and he put the charms on me immediately after I offered him candy! So be warned, he's been a flirt to me and he might call you "little one" and "sweet thing". There might be some issues with JLLM not getting the Lookout or his appearance right and it's simply that I don't know how to program the bot to get the desired result just yet.

Tip: If the bot acts a little funky and out of character, try lowering the Temperature in Generation Settings to 0.8. I find they work much better and in character around there, and less so at anything past or around 1.0 and sometimes even 0.9.
creator: AnneMarie495
